subcodes.title: Tablet to Amir Khan
subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! Thou didst complain about the lack of perfection in various crafts and trades. The multiplicity of crafts is a cause of [3.5s]... ...In ancient times the people of America were, through their northern regions, close to Asia
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی شکایت از عدم اتقان در صنایع متعدده نموده بودید تعدد صنایع سبب
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @excellence; distinction
